English: The LORD God made a woman from the rib which he had taken from the man, and brought her to the man.
Reference Igbo: Mgbe ahụ, Onyenwe anyị Chineke ji otu ọgịrịga o si n'ahụ nwoke ahụ wepụta, mee nwanyị, dutere ya nwoke ahụ.

English: Others jailed includes; Adamu Mohammed who is 22 years and a native of Gombe state
Reference Igbo: Ụfọdụ ndị ọzọ atụrụ mkpọrọ bụ Adamu Mohammed dị afọ 22, ma bụrụ onye Gombe steetị.

English: For who makes you different? And what do you have that you didn't receive? But if you did receive it, why do you boast as if you had not received it?
Reference Igbo: Onye gwara gị na ị pụrụ iche n'etiti mmadụ ndị ọzọ? Ọ dị ihe ọbụla i nwere nke abụghị ihe ị natara anata? Ọ bụ gịnị ka i nwere nke ị na-anataghị anata? Ma ọ bụrụ na i natara ya, gịnị mere i ji anya isi dịka a ga-asị na ị nataghị ya anata?

English: you want to buy something, go to these places
Reference Igbo: Ị chọrọ izu ihe, gaa ebe ndị a

English: This company has stopped work there and sacked her workers,as the investigation is on going
Reference Igbo: Ụlọọrụ a akwụsịla ọrụ n'ebe ahụ ma chụpụ ndị ọrụ ya, dịka nyocha ka na-aga n'ihu.

English: After about one hour passed, another confidently affirmed, saying, "Truly this man also was with him, for he is a Galilean!"
Reference Igbo: Mgbe ihe dị ka otu awa gafere, onye ọzọ bịakwara kwusie okwu ike, "N'ezie, nwoke a so ya n'ihi na ọ bụ onye Galili."

English: He found a fresh jawbone of a donkey, put out his hand, took it, and struck a thousand men with it.
Reference Igbo: Mgbe ahụ Samsin lere anya gburugburu, hụ ọkpụkpụ agba ịnyịnya ibu nke tọgbọrọ n'ala n'ebe ahụ. Ọ tụtụlitere ya, were ya tigbuo puku ndị agha Filistia.

English: But he abandoned the counsel of the old men which they had given him, and took counsel with the young men who had grown up with him, who stood before him.
Reference Igbo: Ma ọ nabataghị ndụmọdụ ndị okenye nyere ya, ọ gakwuru ụmụ okorobịa ndị ya na ha tokọrọ, bụkwa ndị na-ejere ya ozi, ka ha nye ya ndụmọdụ.
